next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: user asked 'Wie viel Geld ... seit Beginn von October 2025 mit der Servicezeile follow-up timeline prototype review ... Antworte nur mit einer Zahl.' I searched invoices for that exact line item, read all 5 matching invoice files, verified issued_on dates are >= 2025-10-01, and summed line_eur values only (not invoice totals): 240 + 480 + 240 + 240 + 240 = 1440. This directly answers the asked service-line earnings-since query.
next_step.observation: All 5 matching invoice files were read and their matching line_eur values sum to 1440.

function.rulebook_notes: Used finance lane exactness and service-line summation from line items.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'follow-up timeline prototype review' appears in five invoices dated 2025-10-28, 2025-11-25, 2025-12-23, 2026-02-08, and 2026-03-20; summing their line_eur values (240, 480, 240, 240, 240) gives 1440.
